steps.title: Spot the defining signal
steps.content: The lady gazes disdainfully at the theater patrons and describes them as “upstarts and provincials” — the underlined sentence embodies this contemptuous attitude toward the crowd.

steps.title: Connect the sentence to the contemptuous attitude
steps.content:
The underlined sentence shows the lady's disdain through its dismissive language and scornful tone — she scorns the other patrons as “upstarts and provincials.” The other three either address topics not mentioned in the passage or contradict the passage's actual message about theater culture.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
